infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: PrivateAI uses the microphone for voice input to your AI personas. Audio is processed on-device.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: PrivateAI uses speech recognition to convert your voice to text. Processing happens on-device.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: PrivateAI reads your calendar to provide schedule-aware AI responses. Calendar data never leaves your device.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: PrivateAI needs full calendar access to read events and create new ones on your behalf. Data stays on-device.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: PrivateAI accesses reminders to help you track tasks. Reminder data never leaves your device.
infoPlist.NSRemindersFullAccessUsageDescription: PrivateAI needs full reminders access to read and create reminders. Data stays on-device.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: PrivateAI accesses your photo library to attach images for AI analysis. Images are processed locally when possible.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PrivateAI uses the camera to capture images for AI analysis. Photos are processed locally when possible.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: PrivateAI uses Face ID to protect your private data vault, including medical records and personal memory.

plugins.calendarPermission: PrivateAI reads your calendar to inject schedule context into AI conversations. Nothing leaves your device.
plugins.remindersPermission: PrivateAI needs access to your reminders to help you stay on track. Nothing leaves your device.
